title: EA Sports FC 27: Kylian Mbappé as Cover Star and Platform Availability
description: EA Sports FC 27 has been trending in the UK with a reported search volume lower bound of 500. Kylian Mbappé is the cover star for the game, and it will be available on Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch.

sources.title: Kylian Mbappé revealed as EA Sports FC 27 cover star

EA Sports FC 27 coming to Nintendo Switch 2, Switch

sections.heading: EA Sports FC 27 Cover Star
paragraphs: According to ESPN, Kylian Mbappé has been revealed as the cover star for EA Sports FC 27.

sections.heading: Gameplay and Trailer
paragraphs: Forbes reports that the official trailer for EA Sports FC 27 has been released, showcasing gameplay and additional features.

sections.heading: Platform Availability
paragraphs: Nintendo Everything states that EA Sports FC 27 is confirmed to be coming to both Nintendo Switch 2 and the original Nintendo Switch.

faq.q: Who is the cover star for EA Sports FC 27?
faq.a: Kylian Mbappé is the cover star for EA Sports FC 27, as reported by ESPN.

faq.q: On which platforms will EA Sports FC 27 be available?
faq.a: EA Sports FC 27 will be available on Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch, according to Nintendo Everything.
